assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) sqa;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1, 2), (3, 4)) sqa;
SELECT i * 10, j * 100 FROM (VALUES (1, 2), (3, 4)) sqa(i, j);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with mixed int and decimal
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.01),(3)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with mixed int and decimal
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1.01),(2),(3)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with mixed int and decimal
assertions.query: SELECT SUM(n) FROM (VALUES(1),(2.01),(3)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with mixed int and decimal
assertions.query: SELECT SUM(n::numeric) FROM (VALUES(1),(2.01),(3)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with mixed int and decimal
assertions.query: SELECT SUM(n::numeric) FROM (VALUES(1.01),(2),(3)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with multiple columns mixed types
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1, 'a'), (2.5, 'b')) v(num, str);
SELECT n, COUNT(*) FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(1),(3.5),(2.5)) v(n) GROUP BY n ORDER BY n;
SELECT category, SUM(amount) FROM (VALUES('a', 1),('b', 2.5),('a', 3),('b', 4.5)) v(category, amount) GROUP BY category ORDER BY category;
SELECT DISTINCT n FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(1),(2.5),(3)) v(n) ORDER BY n;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3),(4.5),(5)) v(n) LIMIT 3;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3),(4.5),(5)) v(n) LIMIT 2 OFFSET 2;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(3),(1.5),(2),(4.5)) v(n) ORDER BY n;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(3),(1.5),(2),(4.5)) v(n) ORDER BY n DESC;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT n * 2 AS doubled FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3)) v(n)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3),(4.5)) v(n) LIMIT 2) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES(3),(1.5),(2)) v(n) ORDER BY n) sub;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3),(4.5),(5)) v(n) WHERE n > 2;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3),(4.5),(5)) v(n) WHERE n > 1 AND n < 4.5;
SELECT AVG(n) FROM (VALUES(1),(2),(3),(4)) v(n);
SELECT pg_typeof(AVG(n)) FROM (VALUES(1),(2),(3),(4)) v(n);
SELECT MIN(n), MAX(n) FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3),(0.5)) v(n);
SELECT n, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(1),(2.5),(3),(1)) v(n) GROUP BY n ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 2;
SELECT DISTINCT n FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(1),(3),(2.5),(4)) v(n) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3),(4.5),(5)) v(n) WHERE n > 1 ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 2;

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with single row (no type unification needed)
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES(42)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with single row (no type unification needed)
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES(3.14)) v(n);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(NULL),(3)) v(n);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1.5),(NULL),(3.5)) v(n);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(NULL),(2.5)) v(n);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(NULL),(NULL)) v(n);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),('text'),(3)) v(n);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(true),(1),(false)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with all unknown types (string literals)
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES('a'),('b'),('c')) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with all unknown types (string literals)
assertions.query: SELECT n || '!' FROM (VALUES('hello'),('world')) v(n);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(ARRAY[1,2]),(ARRAY[3,4])) v(arr);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(ARRAY['a','b']),(ARRAY['c','d'])) v(arr);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with all same type multi-row (no casts needed)
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2),(3)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with all same type multi-row (no casts needed)
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1.5),(2.5),(3.5)) v(n);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with all same type multi-row (no casts needed)
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (VALUES('x'),('y'),('z')) v(n);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1, 'a'),(2.5, 'b'),(3, 'c')) v(num, str);
WITH nums AS (SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3)) v(n)) SELECT * FROM nums;
WITH nums AS (SELECT * FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3)) v(n)) SELECT SUM(n) FROM nums;
SELECT a.n, b.label FROM (VALUES(1),(2),(3)) a(n) JOIN (VALUES(1, 'one'),(2, 'two'),(3, 'three')) b(id, label) ON a.n = b.id;
SELECT a.n, b.label FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3)) a(n) JOIN (VALUES(1, 'one'),(3, 'three')) b(id, label) ON a.n = b.id;
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(true),(false),(true)) v(b);
SELECT * FROM (VALUES(true),(false),(true),(false)) v(b) WHERE b = true;

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with case-sensitive quoted column names
assertions.query: SELECT "ColA", "colb" FROM (VALUES(1, 2),(3.5, 4.5)) v("ColA", "colb");

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with case-sensitive quoted column names
assertions.query: SELECT "MixedCase", plain FROM (VALUES(1, 'a'),(2.5, 'b')) v("MixedCase", plain);

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with case-sensitive quoted column names
assertions.query: SELECT SUM("Val") FROM (VALUES(1),(2.5),(3)) v("Val");

assertions.scriptName: VALUES with case-differing quoted columns and aggregates
assertions.query: SELECT SUM("Val"), SUM("val") FROM (VALUES(1, 10),(2.5, 20)) v("Val", "val");
SELECT * FROM (SELECT n * 2 AS doubled FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) v(n)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT n * 2 AS doubled FROM (VALUES (1), (2.5), (3)) v(n)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4)) v(n) LIMIT 2) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2.5), (3), (4.5)) v(n) LIMIT 2) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves ORDER BY
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (3), (1), (2)) v(n) ORDER BY n) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves ORDER BY
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (3), (1.5), (2)) v(n) ORDER BY n) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2), (2), (3)) v(n)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2.5), (2.5), (3)) v(n)) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4), (5)) v(n) WHERE n > 3) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2.5), (3), (4.5), (5)) v(n) WHERE n > 3) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (10), (20), (30)) v(n) OFFSET 1) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (10), (20), (30), (40), (50)) v(n) LIMIT 2 OFFSET 1) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (10), (20.5), (30)) v(n) OFFSET 1) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (10), (20.5), (30), (40.5), (50)) v(n) LIMIT 2 OFFSET 1) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves ORDER BY with LIMIT
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (5), (3), (1), (4), (2)) v(n) ORDER BY n LIMIT 3) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves ORDER BY with LIMIT
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (5), (3.5), (1), (4), (2.5)) v(n) ORDER BY n LIMIT 3) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves GROUP BY with aggregate
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT n, count(*) AS cnt FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2), (2), (2), (3)) v(n) GROUP BY n ORDER BY n) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves GROUP BY with aggregate
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT n, count(*) AS cnt FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2.5), (2.5), (2.5), (3)) v(n) GROUP BY n ORDER BY n) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT n, count(*) AS cnt FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2), (2), (2), (3)) v(n) GROUP BY n HAVING count(*) > 1 ORDER BY n) sub;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT n, count(*) AS cnt FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2.5), (2.5), (2.5), (3)) v(n) GROUP BY n HAVING count(*) > 1 ORDER BY n) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves column aliasing
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT n AS val, n * 10 AS tenfold FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) v(n)) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves column aliasing
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT n AS val, n * 10 AS tenfold FROM (VALUES (1), (2.5), (3)) v(n)) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery preserves column subset selection
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT a FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (2, 20), (3, 30)) v(a, b)) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values subquery trivial SELECT * still unwraps correctly
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) v(n)) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery with multiple combined clauses
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT n FROM (VALUES (3), (1), (1), (2), (2), (3)) v(n) ORDER BY n LIMIT 2) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values inside subquery with multiple combined clauses
assertions.query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT n FROM (VALUES (3), (1.5), (1.5), (2), (2), (3)) v(n) ORDER BY n LIMIT 2) sub;

assertions.scriptName: values in JOIN preserves inner subquery semantics
assertions.query: SELECT a.n, b.m FROM (VALUES (1), (2)) a(n) JOIN (SELECT m * 10 AS m FROM (VALUES (1), (2)) v(m)) b ON a.n = b.m / 10;

assertions.scriptName: values in JOIN preserves inner subquery semantics
assertions.query: SELECT a.n, b.m FROM (VALUES (1), (2.5)) a(n) JOIN (SELECT m * 10 AS m FROM (VALUES (1), (2.5)) v(m)) b ON a.n = b.m / 10;
